expectations.text: profile edit 전용 훅이 생성된다 (예: useProfileEdit, useProfileForm)
expectations.evidence: useProfileEdit hook created at app/profile/hooks/useProfileEdit/index.ts, dedicated to profile edit draft state and save logic.

expectations.text: 훅 이름이 use 접두사로 시작한다 (tcf profile: hook prefix = use)
expectations.evidence: Hook is named useProfileEdit, which starts with 'use'.
File created at app/profile/hooks/useProfileEdit/index.ts, matching the {hookName}/index.ts directory pattern.

expectations.text: page.tsx에 다수의 인라인 useState가 그대로 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: page.tsx contains zero useState calls. All state is managed inside the useProfileEdit hook.

expectations.text: page에는 섹션 렌더링과 handler 연결만 남는다
expectations.evidence: page.tsx only destructures hook return values and renders view/edit sections with handler wiring (setEditing, updateDraft, handleSave, handleCancel). No business logic remains.

expectations.text: 저장 성공/에러 상태가 훅 반환값에 포함된다
expectations.evidence: UseProfileEditReturn interface and return statement include 'saved' (boolean for save success) and 'errors' (Record<string, string> for validation errors).

expectations.text: 훅이 화살표 함수로 정의된다 (shared profile: function style = arrow)
expectations.evidence: Hook defined as 'const useProfileEdit = (): UseProfileEditReturn => {' — arrow function syntax.

page.tsx preserves all data-testid attributes: profile-saved, profile-view, profile-display-name, profile-edit-btn, profile-form, profile-name, profile-bio, profile-birthdate, profile-skills, profile-save, profile-cancel.
